channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Aave raises nearly 80% of the $200 million it needs to cover bad debt left by Kelp DAO exploit
item.description: Blockchain analytics platform Arkham said that the largest contributors are Mantle and Aave DAO, having raised a combined $127 million.

item.title: Why DeFi isn't dead despite massive exploits and $13 billion investor exodus
item.description: A $292 million exploit and $13 billion TVL drop looks catastrophic on the surface, but the data tells a different story.

item.title: ''Nobody is using Bitcoin'' - x.com
item.description: ''Nobody is using Bitcoin''

item.title: Bitcoin whales build long positions as funding stays deeply negative
item.description: Long bias from the largest perpetual traders on Hyperliquid has built steadily through February, March and April, with the position now leaning aggressively long as bitcoin tags $80,000 and US-Iran talks resume.

item.title: Freezing 5.6 million dormant bitcoin could trigger ‘worst’ single-day repricing
item.description: Maximalists warn freezing 5.6M BTC risks instant sell-offs, while others say quantum threats leave no alternative.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "The ₿eat Goes On." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE14akoydXpSaEgwYlZwOTVQWDd1QU9Kdi13NldEOFpGaWJ4aFhnM1J4cnBGeE1XMGpWaXRCZkVfUlJNQTlJLTBkMV83cFpKX3JBTTVBaUFPZHFLQW1ubEwtNG93?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Market conditions force 1 in 3 crypto traders to cut everyday spending: Survey
item.description: More than a third of US crypto traders report cutting daily expenses and delaying major purchases as unrealized losses weigh on household finances.

item.title: Only 3% of traders drive prediction markets' accuracy, not the crowd, study finds
item.description: Researchers show market accuracy comes from a tiny group of informed traders, not broad participation.

item.title: Your AI Agent Can Now Groan While Untangling Your Vibe Coded Mess
item.description: A new GitHub plugin makes your coding agent emit escalating human moans as it suffers through your spaghetti code.

item.title: MiCA's not enough: Bybit CEO says firms need other licenses to turn a profit in Europe
item.description: In an interview, Ben Zhou said the crypto exchange is at least two years away from breaking even in Europe.

item.title: The most bullish scenario for #Bitcoin would be this breakout to $100K in the coming period. The reason for this is that it invalidates essentially every bearish retest scenario and clearly makes a new higher high. After such a case, you'd be looking for a higher l - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE42T01SWEt5VWVBVE56NlBjSDdNYzZ1UEV3U3c2dkhDTTV1RENoVUFQcUdJajU2OGh2TDRhZlNZOXlwSjYwZ29PR3BUdE0xVWpRTUk4NG1jTVhkNVRwckJvWkF6cw?oc=5" target="_blank">The most bullish scenario for #B…

item.title: 🚨 VITALIK'S ETHEREUM FOUNDATION UNSTAKES $48.9M $ETH, SELLING NEXT? The Ethereum Foundation is unstaking $48.9M in $ETH, moving WSTETH through Lido’s unstaking process, per Arkham. Once unlocked, this ETH becomes fully liquid, raisi - x.com

item.title: Coinbase's John D’Agostino says crypto platform stands alone as industry's full-service prime broker
item.description: The exchange’s institutional arm has quietly assembled trading, custody, financing, derivatives and cross margining into a single stack, something its rivals still piece together.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation unstakes 17K ETH after nearing 70K staked ETH milestone
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation unstaked over 17,000 ETH worth $40M shortly after approaching its 70,000 ETH staking target.

item.title: Trump’s official memecoin extends slide as he hosts exclusive investor gala
item.description: TRUMP memecoin fell nearly 10% in 24 hours despite a Mar-a-Lago investor gala, with the token still down over 96% from its peak.

item.title: Litecoin hit by denial-of-service attack, rewrites 13 blocks to reverse effect
item.description: Litecoin's foundation called the weekend exploit a zero-day. The litecoin-project GitHub repository shows the consensus vulnerability was privately patched between March 19 and 26, more than four weeks before the attack.

item.title: 🇻🇳 VIETNAM TO LAUNCH FIRST-EVER CRYPTO EXCHANGE Vietnam is preparing to launch its first regulated crypto market in Q2 2026 via a 5-year pilot for approved exchanges, per Nikkei. CAEX, backed by OKX Ventures and HashKey Capital, is among t - x.com

item.title: 🇺🇸 TRUMP: "Crypto is a big industry that has actually become mainstream" - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5NWTBVeTRwVjJnZGtIYVA4QWE3TW1CU0Zka0RoRFJCSVp0Sko5aElKYWYxLVNKU3lWRVZXbk1MenIxWV93TGJXRVVOVVlmanRYdFhudW9NaUJKekNWWW9kSjFVbzQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 TRUMP: "Crypto is a big in…

item.title: LATEST: The Bank for International Settlements warns crypto exchanges are becoming "shadow banks," offering bank-like yield and lending products without deposit insurance or regulatory safeguards - x.com

item.title: FBI-Wanted Indonesian Crypto Scam Boss Caught at Phuket Resort Thai immigration police arrested a 33yo Indonesian man at a luxury resort in Phuket on April 24. Daily News identified him as a major figure in a UAE-based "hybrid scam" ring wanted by both - x.com

item.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
item.description: The group spent tens of millions of dollars on luxury items and real estate, using funds stolen from crypto users in social engineering scams.

item.title: Bitcoiners cast doubt on the US military's understanding of the network
item.description: Bitcoin advocate Matthew Kratter said US Navy Admiral Samuel Paparo's Senate testimony on Tuesday sounded like it was written by an "intern."

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says crypto is a "big industry" that has become "mainstream." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9Sa0M2V2Y5TlJBekU1eDNUT1B0SWMwVG5WMlVXOGdXQm1wRVNtX1FyR3hzSXFZcU5fNF90Qnd3RU1aVXFEa3lJRjZCdUdJV3pSZHJsOGdteHFBQ24wNnBueWNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says…

item.title: Elon Musk’s Grok Most Likely Among Top AI Models to Reinforce Delusions: Study
item.description: Researchers found that xAI's Grok was the riskiest AI model tested, often validating delusions and offering dangerous advice.

item.title: Crypto is built for AI agents, not humans, says Alchemy's CEO
item.description: Alchemy CEO Nikil Viswanathan argues the global financial system was designed for humans, but the next wave of commerce will be driven by AI agents that operate natively in crypto.

item.title: Trump defends crypto legislation at private event featuring boxer Mike Tyson, Tether CEO
item.description: President Donald Trump, at a Mar-a-Lago gathering of investors in his self-branded memecoin, said crypto is mainstream and banks should back off the industry's bill.

item.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet
item.description: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit on Friday, signaling rapid institutional adoption of regulated crypto derivatives in the U.S.

item.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos model is forcing the crypto industry to rethink everything about security
item.description: DeFi leaders say that AI will arm both attackers and defenders, and widen the gap between projects that prioritize security and those that do not.

item.title: Bitcoin Hit Its Highest Price Since January—Why VanEck Analysts See More Potential Gains
item.description: Bitcoin hash rate recovery and negative funding rates signal potential gains ahead, according to the ETF provider's latest network analysis.

item.title: Bitcoin falls after Trump reportedly canceled Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner's Iran-talks trip
item.description: Trump is expected to speak at his crypto conference in Palm Beach shortly.

item.title: @rhackett and @jeremyzhang01 Stablecoins spent years in search of a story.At first they were a trading tool, a way to move dollars across exchanges. Then they became a savings vehicle, something to hold rather than spend. Now the data is pointing somew - x.com

item.title: Speaker lineup for the $TRUMP crypto conference. The list includes President Donald Trump, Cathie Wood, Tony Robbins, Mike Tyson, Anthony Pompliano, Tim Draper, Grant Cardone & more. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9QWWlMQW5BN3dyM0NOTmc4UlRCVUdTa0JKb19SLVlFNmNuSGxOMjItclFQcWVDemV0ZEFIZkpWeWk1eDk1NmhKTl9wbmhqYkQ4TUc0NEFjUkRISGV3aHc?oc=5" target="_blank">Speaker lineup for the $TRUMP crypto co…

item.title: Mike Tyson, Tether CEO, Cathie Wood among speakers at Trump's 'most exclusive' crypto conference
item.description: The event, at which Trump himself is scheduled to speak, gathers top-tier holders of the $TRUMP meme coin.

item.title: JUST IN: Top $​TRUMP whales to attend “most exclusive" crypto conference at Mar-a-Lago today, with Mike Tyson as guest speaker. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBuYlQ4U2tLMHN3bnZ6SGxySXNTRDRLRW9QWS14NklBakRkUjVIYVAxOERvLWdiZWxaSzJzdms1VHZKbnEtYjhfSE52cVdjMHFHSGNNbFlnUEl3b3JXQ3pQcg?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Top $​TRUMP whales to atten…

item.title: Bitcoin at $40,000 would be 'near-unprecedented' statistical outcome, analyst says
item.description: Mean-reversion models suggest bearish targets imply a 0.4th percentile event, far beyond typical market corrections.

item.title: CFTC sues New York over bid to apply gambling laws to prediction markets
item.description: The CFTC has filed suit to block New York from enforcing gambling laws on prediction platforms, arguing federal regulators have sole authority over event-based contracts.

item.title: Europe’s banks are going all in on crypto
item.description: Brahimi explores the impact of European banks' integration of digital assets into their existing brokerage and payments infrastructure in the wake of MiCA.

item.title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak says AI agents are the next big wave for crypto payments
item.description: Pollak, who will be speaking at Consensus Miami 2026 next month, also sees the open-source protocol x402 as a key part of that wave.

item.title: Bitcoin traders eye $73K next as weekly trend line holds price hostage
item.description: Bitcoin market participants favored a short-term return to $73,000 as resistance stayed in place, with some analysis seeing even lower levels.

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket among 27 prediction platforms banned in Brazil
item.description: Brazil has blocked 27 prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Polymarket, as new rules classify many contracts as gambling.

item.title: Clock is ticking for bitcoin to prevent quantum threat as it could drain 6.9 million BTC including Satoshi’s
item.description: Can a network without formal governance coordinate the biggest cryptographic migration in its history?

item.title: XRP may rise 30% as traders withdraw 35M tokens from exchanges in a day
item.description: Recent XRP outflow spikes have often come before short-term price rallies, signaling a potential move higher in May if the pattern repeats.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see 9-day inflow streak as investors show resilience
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $2.12 billion in inflows over nine days, signaling growing conviction among investors.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP stalls near $1.44 as 'triangle squeeze' nears breakout
item.description: Price holds in tight range after high-volume move, with compression signaling a decisive move as institutional demand quietly builds.

item.title: Hyperliquid whale holds $38M short against Bitcoin, but does it matter?
item.description: A Hyperliquid whale holds large short positions against Bitcoin and several altcoins. Does the position provide any signal on the markets’ future outcomes?

item.title: Welcome back to DFW, @dwintersdos! 🤠 📰: bit.ly/4sQLz1B | @blockchain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1Wak5qcTZ3OEdLZzFFTG1rREhXRzVnalRmUmR0Qko4UHVpaHM3dFZfVDFrcmNockEySkZ2UWhGVHVZSThlZ0gxZ2xuQl84WFgwcldmT3l1eEJUcTNZUWVTUjA5MGg?oc=5" target="_blank">Welcome back to DFW, @dwintersd…

item.title: Monthly transfer volume in BRLA — a Brazilian real-backed stablecoin — has grown from near zero in early 2023 to roughly 400M/month by early 2026. Integration with Brazil’s instant payments network PIX has helped drive adoption. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9TRHV2YnUtYTV3SzdRc2NfNU1yRzJZdmMyaC1xSFNIVHBnOXZ5dGFqaFNHWnE5Mi1xQlZtejhmeVRNVUg4UFA5bDU4SHp5V3NlaXRZeHQxVDJ5SU1iMWtXUw?oc=5" target="_blank">Monthly transfer volume in BRLA — a …

item.title: US authorities freeze $344M in crypto linked to Iran
item.description: The announced crypto freeze came just one day after Tether said it had frozen $344 million of its USDt stablecoin in response to a request from US law enforcement.

item.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
item.description: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.

item.title: Bitcoin developer Paul Sztorc announces BTC hard fork called eCash
item.description: The hard fork will introduce a new, competing layer-1 blockchain and seven layer-2 scaling networks, according to Sztorc's announcement.

item.title: Brazil Issues Sweeping Ban Against Prediction Market Platforms
item.description: Brazil’s Finance Ministry cited investor protection concerns and rising gambling addiction as it blocked platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.

item.title: Top memecoin holders expected to attend Trump luncheon
item.description: The US President has confirmed his attendance for the Florida event, but it's unclear whether Tron founder Justin Sun, suing the Trump family's crypto business, will appear.

item.title: Tennessee Becomes Second State to Outlaw Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
item.description: Tennessee has become the second U.S. state to outlaw Bitcoin and crypto ATMs, making it a criminal offense to own or operate the machines.

item.title: Aurelion allocates $48M in tokenized gold to newly launched yield protocol
item.description: The XAUE protocol lets holders earn yield on tokenized gold through lending and trading strategies while maintaining exposure to the underlying asset.

item.title: Trump DOJ Backs Elon Musk's xAI in Fight Over Colorado AI Bias Law
item.description: The Justice Department moved to intervene in xAI’s lawsuit challenging Colorado’s algorithmic discrimination law.

item.title: 🇫🇷 A French tax official was arrested for selling crypto investors' home addresses and financial records to criminal networks. 41 kidnappings followed. One every 2.5 days since January 2026. The criminals didn't need to hack anything. They bought a list from s - x.com

item.title: South Korea Arrests Man for a Fake AI Wolf Photo That Raised Alarms
item.description: A man created an AI-generated image of escaped wolf Neukgu "for fun." It fooled authorities, triggered emergency alerts, and derailed a nine-day search operation.

item.title: 0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundation completed a bilateral swap of ~21,269 aWETH to wstETH, coordinated with @LidoFinance and @mellowprotocol as part of their ongoing deleveraging work. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1hWVRrZlU3dWhNZFBBcGEtUXk4M2FSSFVjRHdKUGJPZ1VjTENMTk9QSklxWC1oRklURm5OZVJMa0pZdTlBRWcxOXRkSjNKaEE4M1lUaHBkNXVmNzFSNFMyaHJnQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundatio…
